_shape.name: required, unique
_shape.command: single shell command (use this OR commands, not both)
commands: step 2 — run sequentially, stop at first failure
_shape.cwd: optional working directory for every command
_shape.success_message: optional human-authored line shown on success; plain text or with placeholders; a default is used if omitted. Failure is always a generic 'Failed to install <name>.'
_shape._placeholders: in any command or success_message: {skills_dir} → active agent's <home_dir>/skills, {home_dir}, {agent_name}. Unknown {..} pass through.

skills.name: zero
skills.description: @zeroxyz/cli — installs into the active agent's skills dir
skills.success_message: Zero installed to {skills_dir}. Run `zero auth login` to finish setup.
